english translation text: AA JAA-O CHAND MERE, TERI PYAAS ME BUJHAA-OON COME MY DEAR, LET ME QUENCH YOUR THIRST English Transliteration
COME MY DEAR, LET ME QUENCH YOUR THIRST,
WHERE ARE YOU MY DEAR, LET ME HUG YOU,

urdu transliteration text:
BETA TUMHARA QATIL, MERE SAAMNE KHARRAA HE,JAANE KYUN HASS RAHAA HECHADAR BHI LUT GAYI HE, MUH KIS TARHAA CHUPAA-OON
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
MY SON, YOUR KILLER IS STANDING NEARBY,
SMILING FOR NO REASON,
MY VEIL HAS BEEN LOOTED, HOW DO I SEEK COVER

urdu transliteration text:
TERE JHOOLE KO SAKINA, RO RO KE CHOOMTI HE, TUJHE GHAR ME DHOONDTI HE, TERI MOWT KI KHABAR ME, KAISE USSE SUNAA-OON
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
SAKINA IS CLINGING TO YOUR CRADLE, WEEPING & YEARNING FOR YOU,
LOOKING FOR YOU IN THE HOUSE,
HOW DO I CONVEY YOUR MARTYDOM NEWS TO HER
HOW SUCH A DELICATE NECK OF YOURS, WITHSTOOD AN ARROW, WHAT SHALL I TELL YOUR SISTERS

urdu transliteration text:
NEZE SE GHIR RAHA HE, NANNA SA SAR TUMHAARA, DIL ROTA HE HAMARA, MERE HAATH TO BANDHE HE, SAR KISTARHA UUTHAWUU
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
YOUR SMALL HEAD FALL FROM THE SPEAR-HEAD, IT BREAKS MY HEART,
MY HANDS ARE TIED, I CAN’T EVEN LIFT MY HEAD

urdu transliteration text:
JHULE KE SAATH BETA, MERE HAATH JAL GAYE HE, ZALIM BHI HASS RAHE HAI,TERI AAKHRI NISHANI, HAYE KIS TARHA BACHAA-OON
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
MY HANDS BURNT, ALONG WITH YOUR CRADLE,
THE OPRESSORS KEEP MOCKING US,
HOW DO I PRESERVE YOUR FINAL SIGN

WHEN NIGHT FALLS ON THE DESERT, IT WILL BE DARK,
YOUR GRNADMOTHER WILL CONSOLE & PUT YOU TO SLEEP

urdu transliteration text:
TUM RAAT KO HAMESH, SUNTE THE MAA SE LORI, AB NEENDH AATI HOGI,PHIR GOWD ME LITAA KAR, NAADE ALI SUNAA-OON
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
EVERY NIGHT YOU WOULD LISTEN MY LULLABIES, NOW YOU MUST BE SLEEPY,
LET ME AGAIN PUT YOU IN MY LAP, AND RECITE NAD-E-ALI TO YOU
